question_text: Which of the following is the correct definition of speed?

options.label: A
options.text: Speed is the change in direction of an object.

options.label: B
options.text: Speed is the distance travelled per unit time.

options.label: C
options.text: Speed is the force acting on an object.

options.label: D
options.text: Speed is the amount of time it takes to stop moving.

explanation: Speed is defined as how far something travels in a given time period. Option B is the correct definition; the others confuse speed with direction (velocity), force, and braking time.
